---
title: "Organ donation, transplantation and waiting list"
description: |
  Swisstransplant yearly statistics with interactive plots.
  
  
site: distill::distill_website
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

# Learn more about creating websites with Distill at:
# https://rstudio.github.io/distill/website.html

```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
library(plotly)

col = swt::swt_colors()
```

# Introduction

Describe here what this page shows. Describe data sources and how data is aggregated or any relevant detail about the data that needs reporting.

# 1. Persons on the wating list

```{r fig.height=5, fig.width=5, echo=F}
Year = 2017:2021
Kidney = c(1124, 1090, 1057, 1094, 1046)
Liver = c(198, 192, 209, 222, 233)
Heart = c(88, 76, 89, 77, 75)
Pancreas = c(75, 60, 57, 44, 45)
Lung = c(44, 37, 45, 52, 70)
SmallBowel = c(1, 1, 2, 2, 1)

data = data.frame(Year, Kidney, Liver, Heart, Pancreas, Lung, SmallBowel)

N = rowSums(data[,2:7])

Kidney.prc = Kidney/N
Liver.prc = Liver/N
Heart.prc = Heart/N
Pancreas.prc = Pancreas/N
Lung.prc = Lung/N
SmallBowel.prc = SmallBowel/N


# figs 1-6: Absolute numbers
fig = plot_ly(data, x = ~Year, y = ~Kidney,  type = 'bar', text = ~Kidney, name = 'Kidney', 
              marker = list(color = col$darkyellow.kidney), insidetextanchor = 'middle',
              hovertemplate = paste('Year %{x}', '<br>%{y}<br>')) %>%
  
  add_trace(y = ~Liver, text = Liver, name = 'Liver', visible = T,
            marker = list(color = col$red.liver)) %>%
  
  add_trace(y = ~Heart, text = Heart, name = 'Heart', visible = T,
            marker = list(color = col$pink.heart)) %>%
  
  add_trace(y = ~Pancreas, text = Pancreas, name = 'Pancreas', visible = T,
            marker = list(color = col$green.pancreas)) %>%
  
  add_trace(y = ~Lung, text = Lung, name = 'Lung', visible = T,
            marker = list(color = col$lightblue.lungs)) %>%
  
  add_trace(y = ~SmallBowel, text = SmallBowel, name = 'Small Bowel', visible = T,
            marker = list(color = col$beige.intestine)) %>%
  
  # figs 7-12: Percent
  add_trace(y = ~Kidney.prc, name = "Kidney", visible = F, text = sprintf("%.1f%%", Kidney.prc*100), 
            marker = list(color = col$darkyellow.kidney)) %>%
  add_trace(y = ~Liver.prc, name = "Liver", visible = F, text= sprintf("%.1f%%", Liver.prc*100), 
            marker = list(color = col$red.liver)) %>%
  add_trace(y = ~Heart.prc, name = "Heart", visible = F, text= sprintf("%.1f%%", Heart.prc*100), 
            marker = list(color = col$pink.heart)) %>%
  add_trace(y = ~Pancreas.prc, name = "Pancreas", visible = F, text= sprintf("%.1f%%", Pancreas.prc*100), 
            marker = list(color = col$green.pancreas)) %>%
  add_trace(y = ~Lung.prc, name = "Lung", visible = F, text= sprintf("%.1f%%", Lung.prc*100), 
            marker = list(color = col$lightblue.lungs)) %>%
  add_trace(y = ~SmallBowel.prc, name = "SmallBowel", visible = F, text= sprintf("%.1f%%", SmallBowel.prc*100), 
            marker = list(color = col$beige.intestine))


fig = fig %>% layout(
  yaxis = list(title = ""), 
  xaxis = list(title = ""), 
  barmode = "stack", legend = list(orientation = 'h'),
  title = "",
  xaxis = list(domain = c(0.1, 1)),
  uniformtext=list(minsize=9, mode='show'),
  updatemenus = list(
    
    list(
      y = 1.2, x = 0.1,
      buttons = list(
        list(method = "restyle",
             args = list("visible", list(T, T, T, T, T, T,
                                         F, F, F, F, F, F)),
             label = "Absolut"),
        
        list(method = "restyle",
             args = list("visible", list(F, F, F, F, F, F,
                                         T, T, T, T, T, T)),
             label = "Prozent")))
  )
)

fig
```
